sources.observed: Official page describes required road toll and parking payment at P2 Skjeggedal and vehicle applicability.
Visit Gjende provides parking and shuttle information.
Gjendebaatene states no long-term parking at Gjendeosen and directs users to Reinsvangen.
NOR-WAY describes seasonal shuttle, weather cancellations, toll included in bus ticket, and limited parking.
Fjord Norway recommends parking in Andalsnes near the bus.
Official visitor-centre page confirms car park facility, but live tariff detail was not exposed in the search result.
